Recipe Name: Kwis's Lean Beef & Black Bean Chili

Celery, raw (1 large - stalk - 11" to 12" long)
Red bell peppers, raw (1 large - 3" diameter x 3 3/4")
Cowboy chili starter mix (0.25 tsp)
Description: Chili made with lean ground beef and black beans.
Step 3: Add the veg and cook together.
Step 4: Add the tomato sauce and ketchup.
